body:
This small PR encapsulates some of the functionality of `atmos_surface_conditions` so that it can be used elsewhere. It also tries to introduce a bit of notation hopefully to make the code a little clearer.

With @LenkaNovak and @akshaysridhar
title: Encapsulate surface conditions setting functionality so it can be reused

body:
Not quite like #1935, but almost functionally equivalent when you set the period to 1.

(I cleaned up some unrelated config in the meantime)

Closes #1935
title: Adds an option to periodically check for NaNs in the state
